events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **fail**, high risk. A clamp not listed for direct burial violates NEC 250.53(A)/250.70 (connectors must be listed for the application, direct-burial rated if buried/encased). This is an `installed-defective`/`non-compliant` condition requiring replacement with a direct-burial-listed connector (or exothermic weld) and re-inspection before backfill/closeout.
